title: lithops dendritica subsp. dendritica
intro: Lithops dendritica subsp. dendritica, also known as the 'Tree Lithops' or 'Dendritica Lithops', is a species of succulent plant belonging to the family Aizoaceae. It is native to the southern part of Namibia and is prized for its unique, branching, and tree-like shape. The medicinal properties of Lithops dendritica subsp. dendritica include its ability to treat skin conditions and wounds due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to treat various health issues, including skin problems, wounds, and digestive issues, often consumed as a tea or applied topically as a poultice or salve.
